provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly still life concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi, visible material texture and surface detail, visible brushstrokes, centered on plain dark grey background, Compact identification tags on regulation chain laying on a bunk, next to a worn photo of family, a good luck charm (small stone), and a pocket-sized regulation manual with dog-eared pages — the personal effects that make regulation life bearable
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new, glamorous, people, characters, hands, text, watermark, blurry, low quality

judgment.explanation: Cultural artifact with deep faction identity, appropriate materials and aging.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Not generic sci-fi — reads as faction-specific and lived-in
